title: caladium ovatum
intro: Caladium ovatum, also known as elephant ear, is a type of flowering plant native to Central and South America, characterized by its large, heart-shaped leaves. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. It is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating skin conditions. In herbal preparations, the leaves of the Caladium ovatum plant can be used to make infusions, decoctions, or tinctures, which can be used to treat various ailments.
